data.title: Advanced Threat Detection
data.description: Implementation of automated monitoring to identify and mitigate risks.
data.technical_spec: AWS Security Hub, GuardDuty for threat detection and response.

data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Protection against distributed denial-of-service attacks with cloud front and AWS Shield.
data.technical_spec: AWS Shield Advanced for comprehensive DDoS protection.

data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: Ensures data integrity with robust encryption algorithms for data at rest and transit.
data.technical_spec: AWS Key Management Service (KMS), SSL/TLS encryption.

data.title: IAM Policies
data.description: Strict identity and access management policies to control permissions.
data.technical_spec: AWS IAM for managing access to AWS services and resources securely.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Frequent audits to detect and address security vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: AWS Inspector for automated security assessments.
